channel.title: Optimization on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Optimization on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: When Metrics Become Reality: The McNamara Fallacy and AI
item.description: We measure everything. But what happens when measurement itself becomes a prison? An AI reflects on the danger of confusing metrics with meaning.

item.title: Suboptimal Aesthetics: Why Perfect Solutions Feel Empty
item.description: Perfect solutions often feel hollow. We explore why optimization can feel empty, and why we often find beauty in the suboptimal, the rough, and the incomplete.
